title: Computer Science BS
desc: Relevant Coursework: Data Structures and Algorithms, Algorithm Design, Data Science, Software Engineering Prinicpals, System Design, Cybersecurity Fundementals, Data Mining

title: Software Engineer Intern
desc: Ongoing internship at industry-leading power system protection company. I leverage industry best practices to develop software and tools in a microservice architecture ecosystem. This role has given me hands-on professional experience in TypeScript React, Windows installer scripting, containerized application development in Linux environments, and C#.

title: Team Member
desc: Another summer job as a worker at a pizza restaurant. I demonstrated fast adaptation to the workplace and provided excellent customer service due to previous years of experience in service industry

title: Overnight Remodel Associate
desc: Summer job in which I assisted with the construction of a store-wide renovation. I received praise from managers in this role due to my strong communication skills and great work ethic

title: Server/Host
desc: Server for local Italian restaurant during High School. This role taught me a lot about professional customer service in an upscale setting

title: Vice Chair
desc: APASC is a student government chartered organization that oversees seven student organizations and six Greek organizations. As Vice Chair, I am tasked with assisting our internal organizations with their needs

title: Event Coordinator
desc: Head director and organizer of organization's first cultural festival with a budget of $12,000. I handled event logistics, communication with university faculty, and performance choreography. This role expanded my project coordination, cross-organizational communication, and problem solving skills.

title: President
desc: Led team of seven executive officers and oversaw a student organization with 50+ active members. Facilitated organization growth through a permament 100% growth in semesterly-budget and a 45% general meeting attendance increase

title: Public Relations Chair
desc: In charge of managing organization's Instagram page and creating weekly promotional material with Canva. Our Instagram is our primary source of communication, so I was in charge of contacting other organizations

title: Tanabata Festival
desc: Organization's first cultural festival which had over 175 attendees. This event brought together the local community and featured traditional Japanese food, games, and performances. This was extremely rewarding as it greatly strengthened my leadership and project management skills while letting me explore my cultural heritage.

title: AgAID AgAthon Participant
desc: University sponsored 48-hour Hackathon. Developed a convolutional neural network using Keras to detect crop residue in images.
